question.line: What is a key advantage of a Data Lakehouse compared to traditional data warehouses?

options.A: It only stores structured data in predefined schemas
options.B: It eliminates the need for any data governance
options.C: It combines the scalability of data lakes with the reliability of data warehouses
options.D: It requires all data to be processed before storage
options.E: It cannot support machine learning workloads

question.line: What is a key characteristic of a data lake?

options.A: It stores only structured data in predefined schemas
options.B: It requires data to be cleaned and transformed before storage
options.C: It stores raw data in its native format until needed
options.D: It is optimized exclusively for transactional processing
options.E: It only supports relational database formats

question.line: What is a primary purpose of a data warehouse?

options.A: To store raw, unprocessed data from multiple sources
options.B: To handle real-time transactional processing for applications
options.C: To provide a centralized repository optimized for querying and analysis
options.D: To replace operational databases used in day-to-day business operations
options.E: To store only unstructured data such as images and videos

question.line: What is the primary purpose of Unity Catalog in the Databricks ecosystem?

options.A: To manage real-time streaming data ingestion pipelines
options.B: To provide a unified governance layer for data and AI assets across workspaces
options.C: To optimize cluster performance and resource allocation
options.D: To replace Apache Spark as the main data processing engine
options.E: To create interactive dashboards for business intelligence

question.line: When creating a new catalog in Unity Catalog, what does the “Catalog Type” refer to?

options.A: The programming language used to query the catalog
options.B: The storage location and management type (such as managed or external) of the catalog
options.C: The number of users who can access the catalog
options.D: The performance tier assigned to the catalog
options.E: The visualization tools connected to the catalog

question.line: What is the primary purpose of Delta Live Tables (DLT) in Databricks?

options.A: To create interactive business intelligence dashboards
options.B: To automate and manage reliable data pipelines with built-in quality checks and monitoring
options.C: To replace Unity Catalog for data governance and access control
options.D: To optimize cluster hardware performance for machine learning workloads
options.E: To store only unstructured streaming video data

question.line: What is the primary purpose of Jobs & Workflows in Databricks?

options.A: To create interactive dashboards for business intelligence reporting
options.B: To manage and orchestrate automated execution of notebooks, scripts, and data pipelines
options.C: To replace Unity Catalog for centralized data governance
options.D: To store unstructured data in a scalable cloud storage system
options.E: To optimize GPU performance for machine learning model training

question.line: What is the primary purpose of Databricks Auto Loader?

options.A: To manually optimize Spark SQL queries for faster execution
options.B: To manually optimize Spark SQL queries for faster execution
options.C: To replace Delta Lake with traditional relational databases
options.D: To create machine learning models automatically from streaming data
options.E: To permanently archive old files from cloud storage without processing them
